Area of Research

The research group is currently working on a novel high-frequency switching power converter topology that could be used in a high voltage DC power supply. Design and analysis of high-frequency transformers are also conducted within this research. The research group is in the process of research preparations in other modern applications of power electronics, such as wireless power transfer for electric vehicle battery charging.

The group started its work in 2021 and is currently carrying out a TÜBİTAK 1001 project. Joint project preparations with industrial organizations continue.
